description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a vibrant color scheme, featuring a yellow and pink upper with a blue toe cap and sole. The shoe has a classic canvas texture, reinforced with visible stitching along the seams and eyelets for the laces. The laces are pink and threaded through metal eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern. On the inner side, there is a circular patch with a star logo, reminiscent of Converse Chuck Taylor All Star branding. The sole is flat and appears to be made of rubber, providing grip and durability for urban environments. The overall condition is pristine, with no visible signs of wear or dirt.
description: A colorful high-top sneaker with a yellow and pink upper, blue toe cap, and pink laces, featuring a circular star logo patch on the side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue toe cap, pink laces, and symmetrical high-top shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the yellow and pink upper, pink laces, and blue toe cap.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vertical seam and the two-tone yellow and pink color split.
description_view_3: Right side view features the circular star logo patch, yellow and pink upper, and blue toe cap.
attribute_logo: Circular star logo patch on the inner side, black star and text on a pink background
